title: Ascendency Path of Ruin
atAGlance: A breakthrough path for shattering fortifications, disrupting formations, and ending stalemates violently.
sageNotes: Ruin bearers are siege-breakers who end stalemates with brutal precision. Their gift is not chaos, but knowing exactly which wall, anchor, or command point must fall first. When commanders whisper that a fortress cannot be taken, this is the path they quietly commission.
gameInformation: Built for siege and anti-structure play. Keep direct PC-target burst balanced by situational requirements and setup costs.
